nasb.text: of the gods of the peoples who are around you, near you or far from you, from one end of the earth to the other end),

esv.text: some of the gods of the peoples who are around you, whether near you or far off from you, from the one end of the earth to the other,

cnv.text: 是你們周圍各族的神，無論是離你近的，或是離你遠的神；從地這邊直到地那邊的神，

ccb.text: 引诱你们去拜你们周围各族的神明，或在附近或远在天边，
